artifact_change_verification.change_justification: The merge of github/main intentionally retained both branches' behavior. Relative to first parent 1fc25b19, service.py gained 44 lines: provider runtime imports, a request-scoped prewarm call in create_session, and guarded Codex app-server prewarming for non-interactive/oneshot/interactive/repl CLI sessions. The existing J.1-J.3 primitive-emission imports and create-session emission path remained intact. The merge commit records focused CLI bridge/session verification, so the byte change is legitimate source evolution rather than accidental evidence corruption.

deferred_j5.classification: PIN_STALE deferred; current ambient state must not be blessed
deferred_j5.cause: The seed generator merge-writes non-seed rows from the current ambient workspace, so output bytes depend on accumulated ambient state. The pinned historical bytes are unavailable. The original divergence cause is undetermined: a pre-diagnostic live digest 63d2d184 already differed from a001fe69; diagnostics only produced the latest ab3c4753 rewrite.
deferred_j5.integrity_finding: The live ab3c4753 seed is currently untrustworthy: 17 changed provenance refs do not resolve at head. Rebinding J.5 to it would bless corrupt state.
deferred_j5.routing: Dependent follow-up from the integrated SHA after PacketF5 lands a canonical tracked ledger artifact; use this packet's audited precedent and checker, then require the focused test to pass fully.
